customer.description: Only extract the customer / buyer / Party A organization. Do not extract the supplier / seller / Party B as the customer.

full_name.description: Full legal name of the customer, buyer, or Party A.

short_name.description: Short or commonly used name of the customer.

tax_id.description: Unified social credit code or tax registration number of the customer.

address.description: Registered, office, or delivery address of the customer.

contacts.description: People belonging to the customer / buyer / Party A side only.

role.description: Functional role of this customer-side contact.

address.description: Address associated with this contact if present.

extraction_warnings.description: Warnings about missing or ambiguous identity fields.
